evals.name: basic_spec_generation
evals.description: Tests if the skill generates a full spec with Mermaid diagram, MVP scope, Entities, and Risks based on a conceptual solution.
evals.prompt: Write a solution spec for this conceptual solution.

inputs.solution.md:
**Solution:** Automated Weekly Email Summary
**Touchpoint:** Email
**Core Mechanism:** System queries data warehouse every Friday at 5 PM and sends a personalized markdown table to each user.
**Value:** Saves 15 minutes of manual dashboard loading every morning.
